programme.title: Great Crimes And Trials
programme.desc: In 1996, Zachary Ramsay disappeared while on his way to school, leading police to suspect a known pedophile

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in two cases: Daigle's pool hall vanishing and NJ teen's suspect-linked disappearance.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid NJ and New Orleans murder cases, revealing truths and clearing key suspects.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve IL teen's abduction, NJ serial stabbings, aiding in tracking the killers.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid CA mom's murder case, NJ mom tracks kids taken by ex who evades psychic visions.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in OK flood child loss and NY double murder, warning the killer may strike again.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve two mom disappearances in OR and CA, guiding police toward justice.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid NY couple's shooting, missing OH mom case, guiding police with crucial clues.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help AR and CA families find missing sons, offering hope as time runs out.

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Brian Thompson's murder by a CEO sparks debate, revealing power, ambition, and a shocking manifesto.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: Tupac joins Death Row Records, soon sensing that things aren't as they seem behind the scenes.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: On September 6, 1996, Tupac Shakur is shot while stopped at an intersection in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: LA and Compton Police urge Las Vegas Police to view Tupac's shooting as a ""Compton Problem.""

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: LAPD detectives Poole and Kading were removed from the Shakur case over credibility issues.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in two cases: Daigle's pool hall vanishing and NJ teen's suspect-linked disappearance.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid NJ and New Orleans murder cases, revealing truths and clearing key suspects.

programme.desc: Psychics help solve IL teen's abduction, NJ serial stabbings, aiding in tracking the killers.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid CA mom's murder case, NJ mom tracks kids taken by ex who evades psychic visions.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in OK flood child loss and NY double murder, warning the killer may strike again.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve two mom disappearances in OR and CA, guiding police toward justice.

programme.desc: Psychics aid NY couple's shooting, missing OH mom case, guiding police with crucial clues.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help AR and CA families find missing sons, offering hope as time runs out.

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Brian Thompson's murder by a CEO sparks debate, revealing power, ambition, and a shocking manifesto.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: Tupac joins Death Row Records, soon sensing that things aren't as they seem behind the scenes.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: On September 6, 1996, Tupac Shakur is shot while stopped at an intersection in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: LA and Compton Police urge Las Vegas Police to view Tupac's shooting as a ""Compton Problem.""

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: LA and Compton Police urge Las Vegas Police to view Tupac's shooting as a ""Compton Problem.""

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: Kading's "Murder Rap" highlights the False Narrative, naming Keefe D as key in the 1996 shooting.

programme.title: Tupac: Cover Up
programme.desc: By 2018, Las Vegas police were "reinvigorated" by Keefe D's TV confessions backing Kading's "Murder Rap."

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac Shakur?
programme.desc: After Tyson's fight in Vegas, Tupac and Suge clashed with rival Orlando Anderson, sparking violence.

programme.title: The Bambers: Murder At The Farm
programme.desc: A family is found dead in an Essex, England, farmhouse; the police suspect a murder-suicide.

programme.title: The Bambers: Murder At The Farm
programme.desc: Jeremy's mammoth trial divides the public. He alleges his sister committed the murders, but a crucial piece of evidence contradicts his story.

programme.title: The Bambers: Murder At The Farm
programme.desc: Jeremy's relationship with his parents comes under the microscope, revealing possible motives for the murders. The tabloids hunt his girlfriend, Julie.

programme.title: The Bambers: Murder At The Farm
programme.desc: Bamber is imprisoned for life, but decides to challenge his verdict and clear his name. A band of campaigners and internet sleuths support him.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings Of Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: The 1888 Whitechapel murders by Jack the Ripper sparked fear and enduring mystery in East London.

programme.title: Gang World
programme.desc: Going inside the most dangerous of motorcycle gangs, the Hells Angels.

programme.title: Looking For Mike
programme.desc: Filmmaker Dylan Reibling investigates the mysterious death of his friend, Michael De Bourcier.

programme.title: Dangerous Company
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the seedy and extremely dangerous life of an international trafficker.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: Alphonse Gabriel Capone, was a notorious gangster who ruled an empire of crime in the Roaring Twenties

programme.title: Crisis in Cocaine Valley
programme.desc: A documentary crew gains rare access to Peru's Cocaine Valley, once a major drug zone, now near collapse.
